sentences.target_language: 私は果物を食べることができます。
sentences.base_language: I can eat the fruit.
sentences.romanized: watashi wa kudamono o taberu koto ga dekimasu.

sentences.target_language: 私は後で食べたいです。
sentences.base_language: I want to eat later.
sentences.romanized: watashi wa ato de tabetai desu.

sentences.target_language: あなたは野菜を食べるべきです。
sentences.base_language: You should eat vegetables.
sentences.romanized: anata wa yasai o taberu beki desu.

sentences.target_language: 水を飲めますか？
sentences.base_language: Can you drink water?
sentences.romanized: mizu o nomemasu ka?

sentences.target_language: 彼はワインを飲みたいです。
sentences.base_language: He wants to drink wine.
sentences.romanized: kare wa wain o nomitai desu.

sentences.target_language: 私たちは適度に飲むべきです。
sentences.base_language: We should drink in moderation.
sentences.romanized: watashitachi wa tekido ni nomu beki desu.

sentences.target_language: 私の父はとても上手に料理ができます。
sentences.base_language: My father can cook very well.
sentences.romanized: watashi no chichi wa totemo jouzu ni ryouri ga dekimasu.

sentences.target_language: 皆さんは今夜料理をしたいですか？
sentences.base_language: Do you all want to cook tonight?
sentences.romanized: minasan wa konya ryouri o shitai desu ka?

sentences.target_language: 私はパーティーのために料理をするべきです。
sentences.base_language: I should cook for the party.
sentences.romanized: watashi wa paatii no tame ni ryouri o suru beki desu.

sentences.target_language: ケーキを焼けますか？
sentences.base_language: Can you bake a cake?
sentences.romanized: keeki o yakemasu ka?

sentences.target_language: 私はパンを焼きたいです。
sentences.base_language: I want to bake bread.
sentences.romanized: watashi wa pan o yakitai desu.

sentences.target_language: 私たちはクッキーを10分間焼くべきです。
sentences.base_language: We should bake the cookies for 10 minutes.
sentences.romanized: watashitachi wa kukkii o juppunkan yaku beki desu.

sentences.target_language: その容器ではお湯を沸かせません。
sentences.base_language: You can't boil water in that container.
sentences.romanized: sono youki de wa oyu o wakasemasen.

sentences.target_language: 彼女はじゃがいもを茹でたいです。
sentences.base_language: She wants to boil the potatoes.
sentences.romanized: kanojo wa jagaimo o yudetai desu.

sentences.target_language: まず牛乳を沸かすべきです。
sentences.base_language: You should boil the milk first.
sentences.romanized: mazu gyuunyuu o wakasu beki desu.

sentences.target_language: 私たちは卵を揚げることができます。
sentences.base_language: We can fry the eggs.
sentences.romanized: watashitachi wa tamago o ageru koto ga dekimasu.

sentences.target_language: 今日は何も揚げたくないです。
sentences.base_language: I don't want to fry anything today.
sentences.romanized: kyou wa nani mo agetaku nai desu.

sentences.target_language: そんなに油を使って揚げるべきではありません。
sentences.base_language: You shouldn't fry with so much oil.
sentences.romanized: sonna ni abura o tsukatte ageru beki de wa arimasen.

sentences.target_language: 私は箸で食べることができます。
sentences.base_language: I know how to eat with chopsticks.
sentences.romanized: watashi wa hashi de taberu koto ga dekimasu.

sentences.target_language: 私は普段2時に食べます。
sentences.base_language: I usually eat at two o'clock.
sentences.romanized: watashi wa fudan ni-ji ni tabemasu.

sentences.target_language: 今から食べます。
sentences.base_language: I am going to eat now.
sentences.romanized: ima kara tabemasu.

sentences.target_language: バイキングの角杯で飲めますか？
sentences.base_language: Do you know how to drink from a Viking horn?
sentences.romanized: baikingu no tsunohai de nomemasu ka?

sentences.target_language: 彼らは普段朝にコーヒーを飲みます。
sentences.base_language: They usually drink coffee in the morning.
sentences.romanized: karera wa fudan asa ni koohii o nomimasu.

sentences.target_language: お茶を飲みますか？
sentences.base_language: Are you going to drink tea?
sentences.romanized: ocha o nomimasu ka?

sentences.target_language: 彼女はパエリアの作り方を知っています。
sentences.base_language: She knows how to cook paella.
sentences.romanized: kanojo wa paeria no tsukurikata o shitte imasu.

sentences.target_language: 私は日曜日は普段料理をしません。
sentences.base_language: I don't usually cook on Sundays.
sentences.romanized: watashi wa nichiyoubi wa fudan ryouri o shimasen.

sentences.target_language: 一緒に料理をしましょう。
sentences.base_language: We are going to cook together.
sentences.romanized: issho ni ryouri o shimashou.

sentences.target_language: 私の祖母は最高のスポンジケーキの作り方を知っています。
sentences.base_language: My grandmother knows how to bake the best sponge cake.
sentences.romanized: watashi no sobo wa saikou no suponji keeki no tsukurikata o shitte imasu.

sentences.target_language: 私たちは普段クリスマスにお菓子を焼きます。
sentences.base_language: We usually bake at Christmas.
sentences.romanized: watashitachi wa fudan kurisumasu ni okashi o yakimasu.

sentences.target_language: 彼らはパイを焼きます。
sentences.base_language: They are going to bake a pie.
sentences.romanized: karera wa pai o yakimasu.

sentences.target_language: 貝の茹で方を知っていますか？
sentences.base_language: Do you know how to boil shellfish?
sentences.romanized: kai no yudekata o shitte imasu ka?

sentences.target_language: スープを作るとき、私は普段骨を何時間も煮込みます。
sentences.base_language: For the broth, I usually boil the bones for hours.
sentences.romanized: suupu o tsukuru toki, watashi wa fudan hone o nanjikan mo nikomimasu.

sentences.target_language: もうすぐお湯が沸きます。
sentences.base_language: The water is going to boil soon.
sentences.romanized: mousugu oyu ga wakimasu.

sentences.target_language: 彼は魚を完璧に揚げることができます。
sentences.base_language: He knows how to fry fish perfectly.
sentences.romanized: kare wa sakana o kanpeki ni ageru koto ga dekimasu.

sentences.target_language: 私は普段揚げ物をしません。蒸す方が好きです。
sentences.base_language: I don't usually fry food; I prefer to steam it.
sentences.romanized: watashi wa fudan agemono o shimasen. musu hou ga suki desu.

sentences.target_language: じゃがいもを揚げますか、それとも焼きますか？
sentences.base_language: Are you going to fry the potatoes or roast them?
sentences.romanized: jagaimo o agemasu ka, soretomo yakimasu ka?
